tasks.name: Create CourseProgressRadial component skeleton with Card wrapper
tasks.purpose: Establish component structure with Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, and ChartContainer wrapper before adding chart logic

constraints: Must use ChartContainer for CSS variable theming
Must follow Card wrapper pattern for consistency with other widgets
Component must be client component ('use client')

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page exists but has no widgets. ChartContainer and Card components available from @kit/ui.
tasks.output_state: Empty CourseProgressRadial component with Card wrapper and placeholder div for chart.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/dashboard/course-progress-radial.tsx with Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, and ChartContainer structure.

tasks.name: Add Recharts PieChart with donut configuration
tasks.purpose: Configure PieChart with innerRadius for donut effect and center text displaying percentage

constraints: Use PieChart with innerRadius for donut effect (not custom SVG)
Must handle responsive sizing via ChartContainer
Chart config must use CSS variables for theming

tasks.input_state: CourseProgressRadial component skeleton exists with Card and ChartContainer wrapper.
tasks.output_state: Component renders donut chart with mock data showing 75% completion in center.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PieChart renders with innerRadius showing donut chart. Center displays percentage text. Component works with mock data.

tasks.name: Add data transformation logic with zero-progress handling

action.target: data transformation logic with zero-progress handling

tasks.purpose: Transform course_progress data from loader format to chart data format with special handling for 0% completion state

dependencies: Course progress data structure from I1 loader (when available)
constraints: Accept course_progress data as prop (percentage, total_lessons, completed_lessons)
Transform to Recharts pie data format [{ value, fill }]
Zero-progress (0%) must render empty ring with 'Start Course' CTA
Non-zero progress must show lessons count below chart (e.g., '12 of 18 lessons')

tasks.input_state: PieChart renders with mock data. Component needs real data transformation.
tasks.output_state: Component accepts course_progress data prop, transforms to chart format, and handles zero-progress with CTA.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component transforms data correctly. Zero-progress shows 'Start Course' CTA. Non-zero shows lessons count.

tasks.name: Wire CourseProgressRadial to dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Import and place CourseProgressRadial widget in Row 1, Column 1 of dashboard grid layout

constraints: Place widget in Row 1, Column 1 of dashboard grid
Pass mock data initially (loader data comes from I1)
Widget must be responsive on mobile and desktop

tasks.input_state: CourseProgressRadial component complete with data transformation. Dashboard page exists without widgets.
tasks.output_state: CourseProgressRadial widget renders on dashboard at /home route in correct grid position.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Widget appears on dashboard page at /home. Renders in Row 1, Column 1. Responsive on all screen sizes.

tasks.name: Create unit tests for CourseProgressRadial
tasks.purpose: Add comprehensive tests covering normal progress, zero-progress state, and data transformation logic

constraints: Test zero-progress state with 'Start Course' CTA
Test data transformation from loader format to chart format

tasks.input_state: CourseProgressRadial component complete and integrated on dashboard.
tasks.output_state: Test file exists with comprehensive coverage of all component states.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Test file exists with passing tests for all states. Tests run successfully with 'pnpm --filter web test -- --grep course-progress-radial'.
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web test -- --grep course-progress-radial --run && pnpm typecheck
